<!-- GENERATED by _scripts/build_postprints.py — do not edit by hand -->

::: {.pp-featured}
##### {{< iconify mdi:file-document-multiple-outline >}} Open-access postprints

Author-accepted manuscripts of selected journal articles are freely available
(HTML + PDF, CC BY-NC-ND license):

::: {.pp-chips}
[Math. Mech. Solids 2024](/postprints/crackintrati/){.pp-chip}
[Int. J. Eng. Sci. 2021](/postprints/crackineo/){.pp-chip}
[Int. J. Eng. Sci. 2020](/postprints/nlayer_spheroid_conduction/){.pp-chip}
[Int. J. Eng. Sci. 2020](/postprints/transformhill/){.pp-chip}
[Int. J. Eng. Sci. 2019](/postprints/viscousmaxwell/){.pp-chip}
[Int. J. Solids Struct. 2016](/postprints/viscouseshelby/){.pp-chip}
[Int. J. Rock Mech. Min. Sci. 2009](/postprints/fracdensity/){.pp-chip}
[Int. J. Solids Struct. 2009](/postprints/hillforcracks/){.pp-chip}
[Transport in Porous Media 2008](/postprints/permfractures/){.pp-chip}
:::

[{{< iconify mdi:arrow-right-circle >}} Browse all postprints](postprints.qmd){.jfb-btn .jfb-btn-primary}
:::
